cap53_conditional.note: cap selects fills where the market disagrees with reversal; those lose

fills_attack.p20_is_mid_not_ask: prices-history fidelity=1, nearest within 90s; real ask >= this, numbers flatter the strategy

live_corroboration_decomposed.conclusion: the +$2.88/trade claim is a composition artifact: all PnL comes from a 13-trade deep-discount tail; at the spec-typical 49-53c entries the engine made ~$0/trade

verdict: REFUTED as stated: '+2.6c/share clears fees on TEST' holds only at an assumed 51c fill. At honest fills (pm mid ~52.5c +1c slip, ask >= mid) EV is <= +0.001 unconditionally and -0.06 conditional on the 53c cap actually filling; live book at 49-53c entries corroborates ~zero, not +$2.59/trade.
